caption: A woman with short dark hair and glasses is speaking against a plain black background. She is wearing a light green, short-sleeved tunic with small floral embroidery along the neckline and a dark beaded necklace. A small lapel microphone is clipped to the center of her shirt. Throughout the sequence, she is speaking and gesturing with both hands, which are raised in front of her chest. Her facial expressions change slightly as she speaks, with her mouth open in various positions. In the bottom corners of the scenes, a small gold circular logo appears next to the text "NPTEL". The lighting remains consistent across the frames, focusing on the woman while the background remains dark and devoid of other objects or people.
